name: Cliffside Retreat
description:
This home is meant to be nestled into a cliffside or any raised/sloped surface. First floor open area and second floor master bedroom.  I already laid out the kitchen and dining room. There was a space for a balcony elevator but that's extra. It's 300 comps with some decor. This was one of my first homes I ever built and I would love to place it in your world 🙏 feel free to lmk your thoughts on it or if you want one?

name: Farming Outpost Tower for dailies
description:
Hi i have a bluerpint to sell for farming tower at Aureate Pavilion outpost.
Fully funtional  with a house to rest. You can park your Snow Oath on and farm from below  the tower. Each day you can max your coins, resin ointment, food, medicine,  gears drop (possible to get supreme or gold melodic tuning stone gears ) from mobs easily in 10 mins or less. The horse will auto loot for you and you just reset the mobs by using lightness skill. 
PM me here or ingame UID 4042165548 for info. 

Attach here is the video link on how to farm quickly : https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1696wjs-WNcHzyp49KnSgbZzOUGdCKEjt?usp=sharing

name: Sharing Divinecraft Roads
description:
This is not an aesthetic build by any means, but I think it'll be extremely helpful in the long run for people that wants to collect divinecraft. I just copy-pasted what I wrote in the official WWM server below, hope that's ok.

=================
Hello,
I made a reddit thread a few days ago on importing the CN fire road to global. You'll need a gathering horse, and it yields 291 fire per run without buffs. It was built in reference to 阿菜阿菜's original build on CN because I couldn't find an automated way to import blueprints.

I've also imported their water road, for about 137 (ish?) water per run.

Both builds added together will cost you about 4k+ wood in total.

Over the past few days, I've been popping into players' worlds and sharing these blueprints by hand, but with the build sharing feature added, this can be done by yourself, as long as you have the mats required.

Because I can only share 5 blueprints per day, I've opted to share the water road blueprints first, and the fire road ones tomorrow.


💧  Water road BP sharing links:
```
SHARE6d881edfd172c4d2
SHARE125a7656202e8d11
SHAREbc10f86205868dd4
SHARE51f880eed63cc4e2
SHAREa6fe195fd0cea72b```

💧  Gallery UID in case the links break:
```4012407507```
💧 Video demostration:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qq4FfEHCZ_M


🔥 Fire road sharing links:
```
SHARE6e72b6c3a0e87d54
SHARE4e3b84bb8d694718
SHARE21f5507844559c10
SHAREd5edbcc392d9d400
SHAREeddf4bb41ecaafb1```

🔥  Gallery UID in case the links break:
```4012407507```

‼️  Note:
While importing the blueprints, you might get glitched into the floor, what I did was to teleport out to any waypoint and my blueprint was still placed normally. I think this is because the area I spawn in is always unfortunately in the smack center of the blueprint.

name: Divinecraft poison tower/Conch farm
description:
Hello.

Poison tower should be quite common among us these days, but since the gallery share feature is up, I figured that if you don't have one by now - you can just take the code here and use it.

You'll need the auto-gathering horse (Snow Oath) for this.

=========
Appearance > Mounts > Mount Settings > Mount Follow: Enable
Go into the boxed area of the tower, and stand there. 
Map > Aureate Pavilion (this is the camp right of Kaifeng) 
V/Wayfinder to summon horse
After the horse is summoned, get off the horse
Go into the tunnel that drops all the way down

Mighty drop to the bottom, Dragon breath, wait for the loot
Lightness up to the top, mighty drop back down

Repeat^
=========

This works because the horse is within 30m from you, so it doesn't move, and the pickup radius is also the same. When you do a lightness skill up, you temporarily exit the spawn radius of the mobs, so it respawns as you come back down.

The tunnel places you right at a barrel so the fire insta triggers and explodes it, killing 4 to 5 mobs.

Rinse and repeat until you have enough divinecraft, or max out your daily loot limit (therefore conches, if you auto-recycle).

You'll notice that you take damage from the explosion as well, so I recommend turning on HP food at ~30% to keep yourself healthy.

Here's the sharing code:

SHARE6087d96713af1f72

In case the sharing code breaks, you can find the blueprint at profile 4012407507.
